


&lt;title&gt;Daal Games&lt;/title&gt;
&lt;style&gt;
body {
    font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
    margin: 0;
    background: #111;
    color: white;
}
<p dir="auto">nav {
background: #222;
padding: 15px;
text-align: center;
}</p>
<p dir="auto">nav button {
margin: 5px;
padding: 10px 20px;
border: none;
background: #ff3c3c;
color: white;
cursor: pointer;
font-weight: bold;
}</p>
<p dir="auto">section {
display: block;
padding: 20px;
text-align: center;
}</p>
<p dir="auto">.active {
display: block;
}</p>
<p dir="auto">.game-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(120px, 1fr));
gap: 15px;
margin-top: 20px;
}</p>
<p dir="auto">.game {
background: #222;
padding: 10px;
border-radius: 10px;
}</p>
<p dir="auto">.game img {
width: 100%;
border-radius: 10px;
}
&lt;/style&gt;</p>



    HOME
    OUR GAMES
    CONTACT US


<section id="user-content-home">
    <div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Daal Games</h1><a id="user-content-daal-games" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Daal Games" href="#daal-games"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
    <p dir="auto">Welcome to Daal Games!</p>
    <p dir="auto">We are a passionate Games Development Company creating exciting and engaging mobile games.</p>
    <p dir="auto">Our focus is on high-quality racing and action games that deliver fun and immersive experiences.</p>
</section>

<section id="user-content-games">
    <div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Our Games</h1><a id="user-content-our-games" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Our Games" href="#our-games"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
    <div dir="auto">
        <div dir="auto"><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" href="https://camo.githubusercontent."><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent." data-canonical-src="https://play-lh.googleusercontent.com/ERDu0Q6wgP6vi4sDn22tfikLEOD1AFie_vbU5dZB5oQq5RpT-IzYLxs7zF29_vNQ-cHdGzuVX9ztyDIG5YVH=w480-h960" style="max-width: 100%;"></a><p dir="auto">Room Escape</p></div>

</section>

<section id="user-content-contact">
    <div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Contact Us</h1><a id="user-content-contact-us" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Contact Us" href="#contact-us"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
    <p dir="auto">Email us at:</p>
    <p dir="auto"><b>daalgames01@gmail.com</b></p>
</section>
&lt;script&gt;
function showPage(pageId) {
    let sections = document.querySelectorAll("section");
    sections.forEach(section =&gt; section.classList.remove("active"));
    document.getElementById(pageId).classList.add("active");
}
&lt;/script&gt;
